reconciliationNote: Reconciled to analyst-updated spec.md: SCOPE-03 rows re-pointed off the stale SCN-070-001-09 mislabel to SCN-06/07; new SCOPE-05 covers SCN-070-001-09 (CSRF/Origin); SCOPE-06 (was SCOPE-05) covers SCN-070-001-01/10/11 acceptance.

tests.description: Reject unknown, wrong-password, disabled, unbound, and invalid-grant credentials without identity leakage.
Record the pre-fix unbound-account contract failure, then prove atomic explicit binding and zero token residue.
Round-trip real invite provisioning and prove unbound login creates no browser session.
Use the real form and cookie jar to prove invalid, disabled, and unbound accounts share one rejection and no session.
tests.testTitle: invalid disabled and unbound accounts share one visible rejection and create no authenticated browser session

tests.description: Prove real invited-account registration and login while failed provisioning leaves no usable partial account.
tests.testTitle: a real invited account registers then signs in while a failed provisioning transaction leaves no usable partial account

tests.description: Validate audience, carrier, cookie expiry, revocation, and privacy matrices.
Record the shared-cookie pre-fix failure and prove only persisted browser-purpose sessions survive after repair.
Prove API-header exchange mints a distinct browser session while direct API-token cookie use fails.
Inspect the real browser journey for credential material in DOM, URL, storage, responses, and console.
tests.testTitle: real login keeps password and session material out of DOM URLs storage responses and console

tests.description: Exercise malformed, expired, revoked, wrong-purpose, unknown-key, and shared-token-shaped cookies through real navigation.
tests.testTitle: malformed expired revoked wrong-purpose unknown-key and shared-token-shaped cookies all require re-authentication

tests.description: Validate carrier precedence, session parity, and 401, 403, empty, and degraded separation.
Record legacy acceptance and modern rejection before the fix, then identical sessions across legacy, API, and V1 (middleware-parity mechanism for the SCN-06 modern read).
Use one browser cookie for representative API and V1 reads while preserving 401, 403, and true-empty semantics.
Navigate a legacy page and modern PWA data route after one real login.
tests.testTitle: one real login navigates a legacy page and modern PWA data route without a second credential

tests.description: Distinguish true empty, filtered empty, degraded dependency, access denied, and healthy content under one valid session.
tests.testTitle: authenticated true empty filtered empty degraded dependency access denied and healthy content remain distinguishable

tests.description: Validate login, recovery, safe-return, cookie, logout, and presentation matrices.
Record shared-token/JTI logout failure before repair and prove persisted session revocation and replay rejection after repair.
Round-trip login, logout, replay, and typed revocation-store failure across route families.
Use the real form for login, safe recovery, and truthful logout without interception or auth injection.
tests.testTitle: real form login safe recovery and logout remain truthful with no auth injection interception or bailout

tests.description: Exercise login rejection, recovery, and logout with keyboard, accessibility snapshots, 320px viewport, and 200 percent zoom.
tests.testTitle: login rejection session recovery and logout are keyboard screen-reader and narrow-viewport operable

scopes.scopeName: Product-Wide CSRF And Origin Mutation Protection

tests.description: Validate that every cookie-authenticated mutation family requires a trusted Origin and a session-bound anti-CSRF proof; SameSite alone is not accepted as sufficient evidence.

Record the pre-fix state where a cookie-authenticated mutation family accepts a missing/cross-origin request, then prove every family returns 403 before any state change and passes only with valid session-bound proof.
Exercise login, registration, logout, JSON, and admin mutations with forged/cross-origin requests and assert 403 before mutation, then success with valid same-origin session-bound proof.

Use the real browser to submit server-form, HTMX, PWA fetch, and Cards mutations with missing/stale/cross-origin proof and assert they are blocked before mutation while valid same-origin proof proceeds.
tests.testTitle: cross-origin stale and missing csrf submissions are blocked before mutation while valid same-origin proof proceeds

tests.description: Confirm CSRF/Origin protection holds across login, registration, logout, server forms, HTMX, PWA fetch, JSON, Cards, and admin in the broader authenticated journey.
tests.testTitle: csrf and origin protection holds across every mutation family in the broader authenticated journey

scopes.scopeName: Role And Grant Acceptance And Global Corpus Gating (Disposable Production)

tests.description: Validate representative surface inventory, the daily-user/operator role-grant matrix, and global-corpus grant gating through the unified authenticator; reject bypass-shaped browser helpers.
Capture the pre-fix modern-route 401 after real login, then accepted legacy, Assistant, API, and V1 access with fallback false and one persisted browser session.

Prove one daily-user and one operator each authorize their permitted routes (2xx) and receive 403 outside their grants, and that ungranted global-corpus reads return 403 with no counts, labels, or existence hints.
Reach every permitted representative product surface after one real production-mode login, and confirm the daily-user/operator 2xx/403 matrix with no daily-user admin success.
tests.testTitle: one real production login reaches every permitted surface and the daily and operator matrix returns 2xx and 403 correctly

tests.description: Preserve logout, privacy, empty, degraded, denied, accessibility, recovery, CSRF, role-matrix, and corpus-gate states across the broader authenticated browser suite.
tests.testTitle: logout privacy empty degraded denied recovery csrf role-matrix and corpus-gate states remain correct across the broader authenticated journey
